data_description.api_key: Your Octopus Energy API key (found at octopus.energy/dashboard/developer)
data_description.account_number: Your Octopus Energy account number (e.g. A-AAAA1111)

user.description: Enter your Octopus Energy API key and account number.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data (minutes)
data_description.postcode: UK postcode for solar generation estimates (leave empty to disable)

current_rate.name: Current rate
current_rate.description: Current half-hourly electricity unit rate (inc. VAT)

next_rate.name: Next rate
next_rate.description: Next half-hourly electricity unit rate (inc. VAT)

export_current_rate.name: Export current rate
export_current_rate.description: Current half-hourly export unit rate (inc. VAT)

export_next_rate.name: Export next rate
export_next_rate.description: Next half-hourly export unit rate (inc. VAT)

export_standing_charge.name: Export standing charge
export_standing_charge.description: Current daily export standing charge (inc. VAT)

gas_standing_charge.name: Gas standing charge
gas_standing_charge.description: Current daily gas standing charge (inc. VAT)

tariff_comparison.name: Tariff comparison
tariff_comparison.description: Cheapest tariff cost from historical comparison analysis

carbon_correlation.name: Carbon correlation
carbon_correlation.description: Weighted average carbon intensity of yesterday's electricity consumption

cancelled_error.message: Data update was cancelled, will retry on next interval

timeout_error.message: Timeout connecting to Octopus Energy API

connection_error.message: Error connecting to Octopus Energy API
